disclaimer: Complimentary Electrify America (EA) charging offers vary by brand, model, and purchase/lease date and change frequently. Values below are best-effort and flagged with `verified`. Edit this file to correct terms. Enrollment is required (in the EA app or the brand's app). Idle fees, taxes, and any usage beyond the plan are not covered. NOTE: Hyundai (IONIQ 5/9) ended its complimentary Electrify America charging for new purchases/leases — removed.

plans.unlimited_dcfc: Complimentary 30-minute DC fast-charging sessions on the EA network for the benefit period (modeled as free DC fast charging).
plans.kwh: A fixed allotment of complimentary kWh on the EA network over the benefit period.
